verification_notes: S3.A1 phases proceed betting->player_turn->dealer_turn->resolved (and review payload available in resolved snapshot via decisionLog). S3.A2 illegal actions noop without mutation. S3.A3 decisionLog populated with {playerHandSnapshot, dealerUpcard, chosenAction, correctAction}; correctAction comes from strategyTable.recommendation evaluated against the snapshot taken BEFORE the action was applied. S3.A4 subscribe(listener) fires immediately and on each accepted dispatch. S3.A5 dispatch({type:'deal'}) in resolved phase routes to doNext() which calls freshState() then startHand() with handsPlayed preserved — no page reload required. Contracts to sections 4,5,6 satisfied: subscribe/dispatch/getState/getCurrentHintQuery/getDecisionLog/createGameStateMachine all exposed.
rationale: CRITICAL: dispatch({type:'deal'}) is accepted in BOTH betting AND resolved phases — this is the explicit fix preventing the prior blackjack run's silent S3.A5 violation.
